Critérios de RC atendidos com evidência versionada: (1) hatch check ready=yes coberto por e2e harness `vitest run packages/pi-stack/test/smoke/colony-pilot-hatch-e2e-harness.test.ts` (asserção explícita de `ready: yes`, 3/3). (2) Governança global BLOCK + recovery allowlist consolidada via TASK-BUD-026/048/049 e implementada em guardrails-core/colony-pilot + docs budget-governance. (4) Changeset de RC preparado com release notes e riscos/limites em `.changeset/bright-spoons-jam.md`.

Root cause do classify failure em OpenAI Codex identificado e mitigado: classifiers sem `prompt.system` deixavam `instructions` vazio no payload Responses, causando `{"detail":"Instructions are required"}`. Correção productizada em `packages/pi-stack/extensions/monitor-provider-patch.ts` (generateAgentYaml com `prompt.system` + `repairMissingSystemPromptOverrides` no `session_start`), overrides `.pi/agents/*-classifier.agent.yaml` reparados e documentação de gate de release publicada em `docs/guides/monitor-overrides.md` e `packages/pi-stack/README.md`. Evidência: `node --test packages/pi-stack/test/monitor-provider-patch.test.mjs` (25/25 pass), `npm run verify` (10 checks pass), e smoke controlado com `monitors-control on` + 3 ciclos tool_call (unauthorized-action) sem novo incremento de `classifyFail` em `monitors_compact_status`. Registro detalhado: `docs/research/task-bud-060-monitor-classify-stability-2026-04-20.md`.

Deterministic gates executados com sucesso após slices de calibração: monitor-stability-gate stable=true (userTurns=4, classifyFailures=0) e subagent-readiness-gate strict ready=true (COMPLETE=6, failed=0, budgetExceeded=0). Commits recentes aplicados para redução de ruído/contexto: a483c9b, fe60006.

verifications.evidence: Consolidação final da drenagem segura em janela idle sem duplicar semântica nativa de follow-up: `resolveAutoDrainRetryDelayMs` passou a retornar retry determinístico também para gate `active-long-run` (bounded por `max(250, autoDrainIdleStableMs)`), evitando stall quando a fila nativa ainda está drenando (`ctx.hasPendingMessages()`) no instante do timer. Validação: `vitest run packages/pi-stack/test/smoke/guardrails-long-run-intent-queue.test.ts` => 8/8 pass. Commit: `2e51cc8`.

verifications.evidence: Último micro-slice de governança para drenagem segura em janela idle: `tryAutoDrainDeferredIntent` agora agenda backstop automático quando houve auto-dispatch parcial e ainda restam itens na fila (`shouldSchedulePostDispatchAutoDrain`), emitindo auditoria `guardrails-core.long-run-intent-auto-drain-backstop`. The script does not write `.project/tasks` or auto-prioritize proposals. Docs updated in `docs/guides/session-triage.md` and `docs/primitives/continuity-abstraction.md`. Focal validation: `node --test scripts/test/session-triage-delegation.test.mjs` passed 4/4.

Documented self-reload/autoresume constraints in docs/guides/control-plane-operating-doctrine.md. The doctrine now states self-reload by the agent is backlog/canary opt-in, not current automatic behavior, and requires fresh bounded checkpoint, handoff budget, expected git state, no protected scopes pending, cooldown, audit, and minimal auto-resume from compact handoff before any unattended real use. Documented the local loop without manual nudges in docs/guides/control-plane-operating-doctrine.md. Validation: safe_marker_check passed 11/11 with commandSensitive=none. [rationale:risk-control] Prevents premature implicit automation while defining the path to stop needing human nudges.

Added pure resolveNudgeFreeLoopCanaryGate helper and exported it. No compact/resume/scheduler/self-reload/remote/auto-continuation was triggered. Added read-only `context_watch_auto_resume_preview` tool to avoid ad hoc auto-resume preview scripts. The tool accepts zero parameters, reads `.project/handoff.json` and local `.project/tasks.json` statuses, uses the same buildAutoResumePromptEnvelopeFromHandoff path as runtime auto-resume, and returns compact summary/details with focusTasks, staleFocus, diagnosticsSummary, effect=none, mode=read-only-preview, authorization=none. It never dispatches compact/resume/scheduler/self-reload/remote/automation. Added smoke proving completed TASK-BUD-309 is filtered to focusTasks=none-listed with staleFocus=1 and no caller-supplied taskStatusById parameter. Validation: context-watchdog focal smoke passed 44/44; cmd.exe /c npm run test:monitor:smoke --silent passed 259/259 across 32 files. [rationale:risk-control] A bounded read-only primitive replaces repeated scripts while preserving no operational authorization.
